evals.prompt: Use the LangGraph skill to add retry/cache policies and clear-cache validation to graph nodes.
evals.expected_output: Routes to node-policy skill, names RetryPolicy, CachePolicy, InMemoryCache, and smoke_node_policy_cache_retry_timeout.py.

evals.prompt: Use the LangGraph skill to build long-term cross-thread memory with store namespaces.
evals.expected_output: Routes to semantic-store memory, names InMemoryStore, namespace, checkpoint distinction, and smoke_store_search_memory.py.
assertions: Distinguishes store memory from checkpoint state

evals.prompt: Use the LangGraph skill to implement Agent Inbox-style approval with list interrupt/resume payloads.
evals.expected_output: Routes to human inbox interrupt, names interrupt([request]), Command(resume=[...]), thread_id, checkpointer, and smoke_human_interrupt_schema.py.

evals.prompt: Use the LangGraph skill to validate a local Transformers/Qwen model inside a StateGraph node, without requiring tool calling.
evals.expected_output: Routes to local LLM validation, names smoke_local_llm_stategraph.py --model-path, StateGraph, transformers, torch, and the tool-calling boundary.
assertions: Mentions tool-calling is not what this validates

public_path_leak_search.command: rg local-path leak tokens in langchain/langgraph public files excluding evals

model_test.method: Real Qwen3-0.6B generation using only generated public SKILL.md excerpts for each prompt, no source checkout or research notes.
notes: Combined final result: fifth full Qwen pass succeeded on 7/8 total prompts, then the remaining LangGraph local-LLM prompt passed 1/1 after adding an explicit tool-calling boundary line.
The local model path is recorded only in eval artifacts and final validation notes, not public skill content.
Real local script smoke also passed: smoke_local_llm_stategraph.py loaded Qwen3-0.6B inside a StateGraph node and returned non-empty text on CUDA.
